[![HitCount](http://hits.dwyl.com/EzMinh/Bin.svg)](http://hits.dwyl.com/EzMinh/Bin) ![GitHub All Releases](https://img.shields.io/github/downloads/EzMinh/Bin/total) ![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/github/license/EzMinh/Bin) [![PoggitCI](https://poggit.pmmp.io/shield.state/Bin)](https://poggit.pmmp.io/p/Bin) # Bin 1.0.4 **Remove items in your inventory** # How to use - Use /bin help # Permission | Permission | Description | Default | |:----------:|:-------------------------:|:-------:| | bin.cmd | Allows player to use /bin | True | # Installation Step 1. Make sure you installed Sheep plugin
Step 2. Run ```install Bin``` in console
Step 3. Enjoy this plugin # License and Copyright [LGPL-3.0](https://github.com/EzMinh/Bin/blob/1.0.0/LICENSE)
